title: Overgrown's Origins: Saturn
description: The Saturn Origin data pack introduces a powerful deity character with unique abilities and significant drawbacks. This character, born with limitless power and six eyes, can perform devastating attacks like Black Flash and Unlimited Void.
body:
## 🪐**Saturn: Throughout The End & Nether, I Alone Am The Honored One**🪐
Originally created for [SaturnDevoid](https://www.youtube.com/@SaturnDevoid), the Saturn Origin is inspired by Gojo Satoru from the popular anime/manga series Jujutsu Kaisen. Since April, I've reworked and updated this Origin for Minecraft 1.21, including a complete codebase overhaul.
### 🎉 **Featured by:** 🎉
- 🎞️ [SaturnDevoid](https://www.youtube.com/@SaturnDevoid) on [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ktIZ-VMWsMA)
### 🌀 **Abilities** 🌀
- **Limitless**: Destroys any and all projectiles, including tridents.
- **Black Flash**: Perform an instant dash and combo attack with a reduced cooldown on full combo.
- **Cursed Technique: Lapse Blue**: Create a force of attraction, pulling entities within a 15-block radius.
- **Unlimited Void**: Paralyze targets with infinite knowledge, causing slow death and enhancing your abilities.
- **Gravity Manipulation**: Control gravity and fly.
### 🛡️ **Drawbacks** 🛡️
- **God Complex**: Take 1.3x more damage.
- **Shell Shock**: 30% chance of severe debuffs when hit.
- **Psychotic Break**: Become weaker and slower when health is low.
- **Frail**: Limited to lighter armor and have 8 hearts instead of 10.
